case_title: LISETTE ELIZALDE VS. SOY KHA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIZALDE, LISETTE AS TO DEFENDANT KHA, SOY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2008
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KHA, SOY
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR STEPHEN MICHAEL MURPHY.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIZALDE, LISETTE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIZALDE, LISETTE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-08-2008. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-03-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-18-2008.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-20-2008 BEFORE HEARING; CASE SETTLED BEFORE HEARING AND DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KHA, SOY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIZALDE, LISETTE SERVED MAY-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KHA, SOY
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-12-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-12-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAY-20-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR VINCENT BARRY MCLORG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-19-2008 THROUGH DEC-18-2008.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
